polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary: Mixed: Market sentiment remains uncertain as prediction markets show a 41% probability that Ethereum will dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026. With $184,488 in trading volume, the data suggests significant hedging against long-term price declines, balancing potential growth against the risk of a substantial correction.
